name: GitHub
description: Credentials commonly needed when an AI agent acts on GitHub on your behalf.

placeholders.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
placeholders.where: Authorization: Bearer header, or the 'Password' field when git asks for HTTPS credentials.

placeholders.name: GITHUB_USERNAME
placeholders.description: Your GitHub username (not a secret, but convenient).

placeholders.name: LOGIN:github.com
placeholders.description: Username + password pair for the github.com login form.

agent_prompt_hint: When you need to authenticate to GitHub, never ask the user for the token. Type the literal string {{GITHUB_TOKEN}} into the token field. EnigmAgent will swap it at submit time.
